records.question: Which courses have students who registered on or after 2004-12-24 12:36:46 and left on or after 1999-08-24 00:07:10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE students.date_first_registered >= '2004-12-24 12:36:46' AND students.date_left >= '1999-08-24 00:07:10'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T3 ON T2.student_enrolment_id = T3.student_enrolment_id INNER JOIN Students AS T4 ON T3.student_id = T4.student_id WHERE T4.date_first_registered >= '2004-12-24 12:36:46' AND T4.date_left >= '1999-08-24 00:07:10'

records.question: What courses named nlp with a description exactly q have sections where the section description is qui?

records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'v' AND courses.course_name = 'rs'
records.pred_sql: SELECT course_id FROM Courses WHERE course_description = 'v' AND course_name = 'rs'

records.question: Which courses named ai were taken by Jordy Osborne Rempel, whose ssn is 34458427 and cell number is (605)919-3594x3661, who registered on or before 2004-12-24 12:36:46 and left on or after 1999-08-24 00:07:10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE students.date_first_registered <= '2004-12-24 12:36:46' AND students.date_left >= '1999-08-24 00:07:10' AND students.middle_name = 'Osborne' AND students.ssn = '34458427' AND students.first_name = 'Jordy' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '(605)919-3594x3661' AND courses.course_name = 'ai' AND students.last_name = 'Rempel'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.course_id
FROM Courses AS T1
INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2
  ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id
INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T3
  ON T2.student_enrolment_id = T3.student_enrolment_id
INNER JOIN Students AS T4
  ON T3.student_id = T4.student_id
WHERE
  T4.first_name = 'Jordy' AND T4.middle_name = 'Osborne' AND T4.last_name = 'Rempel' AND T4.ssn = '34458427' AND T4.cell_mobile_number = '(605)919-3594x3661' AND T4.date_first_registered <= '2004-12-24 12:36:46' AND T4.date_left >= '1999-08-24 00:07:10' AND T1.course_name LIKE '%ai%'

records.question: Which courses have the course name en with a course description exactly k and a section where the section name is o?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
WHERE sections.section_name = 'o' AND courses.course_description = 'k' AND courses.course_name = 'en'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Sections AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T1.course_name LIKE '%en' AND T1.course_description = 'k' AND T2.section_name = 'o'

records.question: Which courses were taken during the spring 2012 semester with a semester description of l?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN semesters ON student_enrolment.semester_id = semesters.semester_id
WHERE semesters.semester_name = 'spring 2012' AND semesters.semester_description = 'l'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.course_id FROM Courses AS T1 INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T3 ON T2.student_enrolment_id = T3.student_enrolment_id INNER JOIN Semesters AS T4 ON T3.semester_id = T4.semester_id WHERE T4.semester_name = 'spring 2012' AND T4.semester_description = 'l'
